# =========================================
# Unity Gitignore
# https://github.com/github/gitignore/blob/main/Unity.gitignore
# =========================================

# --- Unity generated folders ---
[Ll]ibrary/
[Tt]emp/
[Bb]uild/
[Bb]uilds/
[Ll]ogs/
UserSettings/

# --- Autogenerated files ---
*.csproj
*.unityproj
*.sln
*.suo
*.tmp
*.user
*.userprefs
*.pidb
*.booproj
*.svd
*.pdb
*.mdb
*.opendb
*.VC.db

# --- Unity Cache/Build artifacts ---
MemoryCaptures/
SysInfo.txt

# --- Asset Store Tools ---
Assets/AssetStoreTools*

# --- Crash reports ---
sysinfo.txt

# --- Visual Studio cache ---
.vs/

# --- Rider IDE ---
.idea/
*.sln.iml

# --- Build output ---
/[Bb]uild/
/[Bb]uilds/
/[Bb]in/
/Oo]bj/

# --- Logs ---
*.log

# --- OS generated files ---
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
